notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for vietnam. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: 中国护照越南短期旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国护照持有人计划去越南短期旅游时，VIZA AI 应优先考虑越南官方 E-visa 电子签证路线，而不是美国 DS-160、英国 Standard Visitor 或申根签证。越南移民局官方页面说明，电子签证由 Vietnam Immigration Department 通过电子系统签发；境外外国人可通过 evisa.gov.vn 官方入口自行申请。回答时先确认目的地是越南、国籍、旅行目的、停留天数、入境口岸和是否需要多次入境。

chunks.title: Vietnam e-visa validity and basic conditions
chunks.content: Vietnam E-visa is valid for a maximum of 90 days and can be single or multiple entry. The official Immigration Department page lists basic conditions: the applicant is outside Vietnam, holds a valid passport, and is not in a category suspended from entry under Vietnamese law. The fee is paid through the official electronic payment gateway and is not refunded if the application is refused. Travellers should check the official list of ports that allow entry and exit with an E-visa.

chunks.title: Vietnam official e-visa portal domains
chunks.content: The legacy Vietnam Immigration Department portal states that, from 08:00 on 11 November 2024 GMT+7, the Vietnam Electronic Visa Portal operates on the new domains thithucdientu.gov.vn and evisa.gov.vn. For VIZA AI: direct users to official .gov.vn portals and warn them to avoid unofficial paid lookalike sites when possible.

documents.title: Vietnam Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Vietnam application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Vietnam official e-visa portal Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://evisa.xuatnhapcanh.gov.vn/trang-chu-ttdt. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Vietnam fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, portrait/photo, travel dates, entry and exit ports, address in Vietnam, purpose, email/contact and single/multiple entry selection

chunks.title: Vietnam supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport biodata page, portrait/photo, entry/exit plan, accommodation/address and payment method Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for vietnam.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://evisa.xuatnhapcanh.gov.vn/trang-chu-ttdt ; https://thithucdientu.gov.vn ; https://evisa.gov.vn

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- Vietnam E-visa is valid for maximum of 90 days, single or multiple entry.

Travel plan and port fields:
- Vietnam E-visa is valid for maximum of 90 days, single or multiple entry.
- List of Ports that allowed foreigners enter and exit Vietnam by E-visa.
- Not falling into the cases of suspension from entry prescribed in Article 21 of Law on foreigners' entry into, exit from, transit through, residence in Vietnam.

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- They should send visa applications via the inviting or guaranteeing agencies and organizations to the competent agency of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
